channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Israel accuses Hezbollah of ceasefire violation, issues displacement orders
item.description: Israel warns of attacks as Iran insists Lebanon must be included in any peace deal with the United States.

item.title: Romanian president picks Liberal former mayor as PM to form new government
item.description: Adrian Vestea nominated as prime minister after previous choice, Eugen Tomac, withdraws.

item.title: Will the US-Iran deal be signed on Sunday? What we know so far
item.description: US says a deal to stop the war on Iran could be signed as early as Sunday. Tehran, however, disputes the timeline.

item.title: World Cup Day 4: Netherlands vs Japan, Curacao debut, prediction, schedule
item.description: The Netherlands face Japan in a must-watch game as World Cup Day 4 brings predictions, key fixtures and other headlines.

item.title: UK court to rule on Palestine Action ‘terrorist’ label: What we know
item.description: Court of Appeal to rule whether government's proscription of action group was unlawful.

item.title: The World Cup cicada: India’s rare insect on a four-year clock
item.description: A rare cicada emerges from the forests of Meghalaya, every four years, in time with the World Cup.

item.title: Signing of US-Iran deal not on Trump’s public schedule
item.description: Signing of US-Iran deal not on Trump’s public schedule.

item.title: UK forces seize suspected Russian shadow fleet tanker in English Channel
item.description: The UK Ministry of Defence says it captures the vessel Smyrtos in an operation that lasts six hours.

item.title: Switzerland votes on right-wing bid to cap country’s population
item.description: A 'yes' vote would force the government to restrict asylum, residency permits, and scrap EU deal on free movement.

item.title: Iran war day 107: Washington, Tehran close to signing first stage of deal
item.description: Trump says a deal to stop the Iran war could be signed as early as Sunday, but Tehran downplays his optimism.

item.title: 2026 World Cup: Australia stun Turkiye 2-0 in counterattacking masterclass
item.description: Australia secure win in Group D courtesy of goals from Nestory Irankunda and Connor Metcalfe.

item.title: Smiles all around as Morocco, Brazil share spoils and Knicks make history
item.description: World Cup opener ends in a draw for Morocco and Brazil as local fans celebrate New York Knicks' basketball triumph.

item.title: Costs, careers and choice: Why Indians are having fewer children
item.description: India’s Total Fertility Rate (TFR) has dropped to 1.9 children per woman - lower than the benchmark level of 2.1.

item.title: Qatar earns first ever World Cup point
item.description: Qatar has earned its first-ever FIFA World Cup point in dramatic fashion against Switzerland.

item.title: Knicks clinch first NBA title in 53 years, as Brunson shines against Spurs
item.description: The New York Knicks ended their championship drought on Saturday, winning the best-of-seven NBA Finals series 4-1.

item.title: ‘Lion of Mesopotamia’: How Aymen Hussein beat tragedy to reach World Cup
item.description: Iraq’s ‘most expensive footballer’, striker who scored Iraq’s qualifying goal against Bolivia, retraces his journey.

item.title: Scotland beat Haiti 1-0 to mark a winning return to the World Cup
item.description: John McGinn's deflected goal gives the Scots a World Cup win for the first time since 1990.

item.title: Two killed in Israeli strike on Gaza
item.description: An Israeli strike on southern Gaza has killed two people and injured another, according to Palestinian authorities.

item.title: After battling armed attacks, Mauritania attempts to revive tourism
item.description: Armed groups linked to al-Qaeda began attacks in the mid-2000s, but several security measures have halted them.

item.title: Why is the price of gold trending down?
item.description: Gold has been under pressure since the US and Israel launched a war against Iran in late February.

item.title: Vinicius drags low-key Brazil level against dominant Morocco at World Cup
item.description: Vinicius Jr individual effort lift Brazil's struggle in team's 2026 tournament opener against Africa champions Morocco.

item.title: America250 versus Freedom 250: What to know about the US semiquincentennial
item.description: The celebrations to mark the US's 250th anniversary have been overshadowed by questions about Trump's influence.

item.title: Haiti fans in the streets, Scotland faithful in kilts
item.description: It’s expected to be a spicy encounter: Haiti supporters and Scotland’s Tartan Army celebrate World Cup matchup.

item.title: Iran war live: Trump says deal to be signed today; Israel hits south Beirut
item.description: US and Iran appear close to signing the first stage of a peace deal, the two sides differ on when it will be signed.

item.title: Brazil and Morocco kickoff amid electric atmosphere
item.description: Brazil and Morocco supporters sang, danced and chanted their way to one of the most anticipated group-stage matches.
